annotation.figma_label:
riido.v2.aiAgent.events.stream
종류: SSE Stream
배경: threads 조회 결과에 active_stream이 있을 때만 연결해 진행 상태와 thread 갱신 이벤트를 받습니다.
annotation.resolution: The Figma handoff note now keeps the facade path on the first line, marks it as an SSE Stream, and explains that clients connect only when the task-thread cold collection returns an active_stream link.
